description: User clicks the 'From $127' button to select the 6:10am flight from Adelaide to Melbourne.
frame_description: The user is on the flight results page and selects a specific flight.

description: The 'Select Departing Fare Type' modal appears on screen.
frame_description: A modal overlay appears showing different fare options (Lite, Choice, Flex).

description: User pauses to review the different fare types and their inclusions in the modal.
frame_description: The cursor moves slightly over the fare options in the modal.

description: User selects the 'Lite' fare option by clicking the 'SELECT' button.
frame_description: The cursor is over the SELECT button which then changes to a green checkmark.

description: A loading overlay with the text 'Good choice!' appears.
frame_description: The screen fades and a loading spinner with 'Good choice!' is displayed.

description: The page navigates to the return flight selection screen.
frame_description: The UI updates to show 'Select Return Flight' for Melbourne to Adelaide.

description: User dwells on the 'Select Return Flight' page, reviewing available options.
frame_description: The user is looking at the list of return flights.
